# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.OcclusionChangedEventHandler delegate

Emitted when occlusion parameters change.

```csharp
public delegate void OcclusionChangedEventHandler(int wallCount, float cutoffHz);
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| wallCount | Number of walls involved. |
| cutoffHz | Only frequencies below this value can pass through to the listener. |
